meta.title: Intellectual Investment: Learn First, Understand First, Collaborate If Suitable | Muôn Nơi
meta.description: Discover the intellectual investment journey at Muôn Nơi: learn first, understand first, collaborate if suitable. No guaranteed returns, no capital repayment promises.

hero.h1: Investment here is a journey of learning, doing, growing, and developing together
hero.subheadline: Discover the philosophy of intellectual investment: learn first, understand first, collaborate if suitable

philosophy.title: Investment Philosophy
philosophy.content: Intellectual investment is different from conventional financial investment. It requires understanding risks, mechanisms, and personal suitability before committing capital. We believe that the more participants understand, the better their decision-making ability.

not_investment.title: What Investment Here is NOT
not_investment.content: This is not a public securities offering. No guaranteed returns. No capital repayment promises. Not a 'get rich quick' opportunity. Not a place to 'secure slots' or 'lock in deals'.

journey.title: Participant Journey
journey.content: From interest → learn → review → participate. Each step is designed to ensure participants understand risks and opportunities before committing capital.

value.title: Value Received
value.content: The greatest value is knowledge, network, and development opportunities — not financial returns. Intellectual investment is investing in yourself and your capabilities.

risk.title: Risk and Reality
risk.content: Risk of capital loss is real. No capital repayment promises. No guaranteed returns. Investment decisions are your responsibility.

system.title: System and Projects
system.content: The projects we're developing: AI Computer Ecosystem, AIAgent Infrastructure, and Nhà Chung / Muôn Nơi Workforce & Community Tech Program.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.content: Start by understanding the philosophy, viewing the journey, and expressing collaboration interest — not by transferring money immediately.
